fields.value:
contract_version: "1.0.0"
project_id: "prj_20260721-1447"
source:

  protocol_title: "Effects of continuous positive airway pressure on neurocognitive architecture and function in patients with obstructive sleep apnoea: study protocol for a multicentre randomised controlled trial"
  protocol_version: "unresolved"
  protocol_date: "unresolved"
  publication_citation: "BMJ Open 2017;7:e014932"

study_summary:
  design: "Multicentre, evaluator-blinded, randomised, parallel-controlled trial"
  planned_enrolment: 148
  population: "Han adults aged 30-65 years with newly diagnosed moderate-to-severe obstructive sleep apnoea"
  arms:
    - "CPAP plus best supportive care"
    - "Best supportive care only"
  randomisation_ratio: "1:1"
  scheduled_assessments:
    - "baseline before randomisation"
    - "3 months"
    - "6 months"
    - "12 months"
  primary_endpoint: "Montreal Cognitive Assessment (MoCA)"

candidate_forms:
  - candidate_id: "screening-eligibility"
    title: "Screening and Eligibility"
    purpose: "Document diagnostic, inclusion, and exclusion criteria before enrolment."
    visit: "screening"
    source_refs:
      - locator: "Study population, diagnostic criteria, and eligible participants, pages 2-3"
        confidence: "high"
  - candidate_id: "baseline-characteristics"
    title: "Baseline Characteristics"
    purpose: "Collect age, sex, education, medical history, medication use, occupation, MoCA, and MMSE before randomisation."
    visit: "baseline"
    source_refs:
      - locator: "Basic characteristics, page 4"
        confidence: "high"
  - candidate_id: "randomisation"
    title: "Randomisation"
    purpose: "Record equal allocation to CPAP plus BSC or BSC only after eligibility and baseline assessment."
    visit: "baseline after assessments"
    source_refs:
      - locator: "Randomisation, allocation concealment and blinding, page 4"
        confidence: "high"
  - candidate_id: "neurocognitive-assessment"
    title: "Neurocognitive Assessment"
    purpose: "Capture the primary MoCA endpoint, MMSE, and named neuropsychological test results."
    visit: "baseline, 3 months, 6 months, and 12 months"
    source_refs:
      - locator: "Primary and secondary outcomes, page 4"
        confidence: "high"
      - locator: "Neuropsychological tests, page 5"
        confidence: "high"
  - candidate_id: "sleep-respiratory-assessment"
    title: "Sleep Respiratory Assessment"
    purpose: "Capture protocol-named polysomnography and sleep respiratory outcomes."
    visit: "baseline, 3 months, 6 months, and 12 months"
    source_refs:
      - locator: "Secondary endpoints - sleep variables, page 4"
        confidence: "high"
      - locator: "Sleep respiratory variables, page 5"
        confidence: "high"
  - candidate_id: "laboratory-biomarkers-specimens"
    title: "Laboratory, Biomarker, and Specimen Assessment"
    purpose: "Capture protocol-named biochemical, inflammatory, anti-inflammatory, oxidative-stress, urine, blood, faecal, metabolomic, and microbiome assessments."
    visit: "baseline, 3 months, 6 months, and 12 months"
    source_refs:
      - locator: "Other outcomes - biochemical variables, pages 4-5"
        confidence: "high"
      - locator: "Urine, blood, and faecal samples, page 5"
        confidence: "high"
  - candidate_id: "anthropometry-cardiopulmonary"
    title: "Anthropometry and Cardiopulmonary Assessment"
    purpose: "Capture anthropometry, blood pressure, echocardiography, arterial stiffness, pulmonary function, and ECG assessments."
    visit: "baseline and follow-up; lung-function and ECG schedule unresolved"
    source_refs:
      - locator: "Oxidative stress index and study examination procedures, page 5"
        confidence: "high"
  - candidate_id: "auditory-eeg-assessment"
    title: "Auditory and High-Density EEG Assessment"
    purpose: "Capture audiometry, DPOAE, central auditory processing tests, and protocol-specified EEG task results."
    visit: "baseline, 3 months, 6 months, and 12 months"
    source_refs:
      - locator: "Auditory testing, pages 4-5"
        confidence: "high"
      - locator: "256-channel high-density EEG recording, pages 5-6"
        confidence: "high"
  - candidate_id: "brain-imaging-mrs"
    title: "Brain Imaging and Magnetic Resonance Spectroscopy"
    purpose: "Capture structural MRI, resting-state fMRI, diffusion imaging, and cerebral metabolite assessment status and results."
    visit: "baseline, 3 months, 6 months, and 12 months"
    source_refs:
      - locator: "Secondary endpoints, page 4"
        confidence: "high"
      - locator: "Brain imaging and cerebral metabolites, page 6"
        confidence: "high"
  - candidate_id: "cpap-compliance"
    title: "CPAP Treatment and Compliance"
    purpose: "Capture CPAP exposure and device-derived adherence information for the CPAP plus BSC group."
    visit: "during intervention and follow-up"
    source_refs:
      - locator: "CPAP plus BSC group and Follow-up, page 4"
        confidence: "high"
  - candidate_id: "adverse-events"
    title: "Adverse Events"
    purpose: "Capture unexpected adverse events associated with CPAP, including severity, causality, and serious-event reporting."
    visit: "during the OSA treatment period"
    source_refs:
      - locator: "Safety measurements, page 6"
        confidence: "high"
  - candidate_id: "withdrawal-disposition"
    title: "Withdrawal and Disposition"
    purpose: "Document protocol-specified withdrawal circumstances and study disposition."
    visit: "as needed"
    source_refs:
      - locator: "Withdrawal criteria, page 3"
        confidence: "high"

selected_form:

  fields:

      label: "Study identifier"
      purpose: "Display or prepopulate the unique study identifier on the screening eCRF."
      data_type: "string"

      range: null
      options: []

        - "This should be system-prepopulated rather than manually entered."
      inference:
        kind: "inferred_supporting_field"
        rationale: "A study identifier is directly implied by the named trial and its CRF data-management process."

      coding:
        status: "unresolved"
        rationale: "Official candidate IE.STUDYID identified; specialist selection and the actual sponsor study identifier remain pending."

    severity: "blocking"
    question: "Approve replacing software Boolean fields with CDISC-coded string radio fields using Y (Yes, NCIt C49488) and N (No, NCIt C49487) from codelist C66742 for all Yes/No eligibility responses."
    affected_concepts:

    resolved_by: "user decision in Codex task"
    resolved_at: "2026-07-21"

    severity: "warning"
    question: "Confirm addition of height in cm, weight in kg, and calculated BMI rounded to two decimal places in the current Screening/Eligibility form."
    affected_concepts:

      - "bmi"
